layers.name: Applications
layers.description: Runtime interfaces such as the Telegram bot server and documentation application.

layers.name: Packages
layers.description: Reusable infrastructure, domain-support, and cross-cutting engines under packages/.

layers.name: Modules
layers.description: Business capabilities under modules/ with isolated handlers, services, repositories, locales, and manifests.

layers.name: SpecKit Specifications
layers.description: Feature specifications and implementation plans that define Tempot delivery history.

layers.name: Governance and Methodology
layers.description: Constitution, role framework, roadmap, architecture docs, and delivery concepts.

tour.title: Start With Governance
tour.description: Read the constitution, role framework, roadmap, and methodology before making implementation decisions.

tour.title: Understand Runtime Entry Points
tour.description: Inspect the bot server and docs app as the two current application surfaces.

tour.title: Understand Reusable Engines
tour.description: Packages provide database, eventing, AI, CMS, import, document, search, settings, and UX foundations.

tour.title: Understand Business Modules
tour.description: Modules are isolated business capabilities. user-management is the current production reference module.

tour.title: Follow The Module Tooling Path
tour.description: Use the module catalog, generator plan, checklist, and CLI doctor before building new modules.
